title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Loki, Unknown person #11 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can clearly tell there was a fire here too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but there's no sign of any burned books...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: and biblio the owl isn't here either!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But wait... let's not lose hope...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What if he escaped with the books?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope that's the case... but then... where is biblio now???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ever since the counter- attack began...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's not like we were fighting some massive organ- nization or anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they were knights of the Holy Land... There were only three of them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, just three people ma- naged to throw all of Elbaf into chaos...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What Happen- Ed to Imu- Sama?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: At the edge of the western village.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: just go to the village yourself. I'm not going over there to get it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Mu shall withdraw from the Holy Land...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
